text: Inside this bright, modern space, I feel as though I stand on the threshold between the known and the experimental. The clean lines and glass walls usher in an atmosphere of potential, of ideas yet to crystallize. Approaching the R+D exhibit, I'm taken by a subtle excitement—an open invitation to innovation and reflection. There's ambiguity here, and that makes me curious, even a bit hopeful. The presence of words and images dedicated to design and possibility leads me towards optimistic contemplation about the future and my own creative capacity.
